title: Protect ISRO
description: Indian satellite asset faces a high-risk conjunction and OrbitGuard plans a safe avoidance maneuver.
summary: Protect ISRO deterministic scenario ready. Use top conjunction 'conj-protect-isro-001' for the maneuver flow.

events.title: Protect ISRO initialized
events.description: OrbitGuard loads the protected asset and local demo catalog.

events.title: Critical conjunction detected
events.description: The worklist ranks the demo debris encounter as the top risk.

events.title: Avoidance plan ready
events.description: The Copilot recommends a low-delta-v along-track maneuver.
